en_title: EA Sports FC, Madden NFL Publisher Announces EA Advertising
cn_title: EA推出体育游戏广告新平台
subtitle: 赛场即广告牌
opus_summary: EA正式推出EA Advertising平台，在《麦登橄榄球》《EA Sports FC》等体育游戏中内置动态广告，覆盖超过1.2亿月活玩家。

paragraphs.en: There's a new announcement today from EA, but it's not a fresh Battlefield or Titanfall game. Instead, the publishing giant has announced EA Advertising — a platform designed to place brands directly into its portfolio of popular sports titles, such as Madden NFL and EA Sports FC .
paragraphs.cn: 今天EA发布了一项新公告，但并非新的《战地风云》或《泰坦陨落》游戏。这家发行巨头宣布推出EA Advertising——一个旨在将品牌直接嵌入其热门体育游戏阵容的平台，比如《麦登橄榄球》和《EA Sports FC》。

paragraphs.en: EA said its enormous audience of more than 120 million monthly players was the perfect place for companies to advertise at scale, through "dynamic, real-time placements, from stadium signage to custom in-game content, designed to enhance, not disrupt, the player experience."
paragraphs.cn: EA表示，其超过1.2亿月活玩家的庞大受众是公司进行大规模广告投放的理想场所，通过「动态实时广告位，从体育场标牌到定制游戏内内容，旨在提升而非干扰玩家体验」。

paragraphs.en: Brands could offer sponsored in-game challenges, EA suggested, with branded cosmetic items as rewards. Alternatively, companies could pay to sponsor on-pitch digital advertising boards, scoreboards, or broadcast overlays — just as sporting events are plastered with commercial sponsors in real life.
paragraphs.cn: EA提议，品牌可以推出赞助型游戏内挑战，并以品牌化外观物品作为奖励。或者，公司可以付费赞助赛场上的数字广告牌、记分牌或转播叠层——就像现实中的体育赛事贴满商业赞助商一样。

paragraphs.en: Within its games, EA says it can now offer a proprietary ad server and SDK [software development kit] tied to its in-house Frostbite engine, so advertisers can "improve targeting and gain deeper campaign insights."
paragraphs.cn: EA表示，现在可以在其游戏中提供与自研寒霜引擎绑定的专有广告服务器和SDK（软件开发工具包），以便广告商「改善定位并获得更深入的广告活动洞察」。

paragraphs.en: "Brands can activate across live environments, tailoring placements to meet campaign objectives, and update campaigns with ongoing optimization informed by aggregated engagement insights," EA continued.
paragraphs.cn: EA补充说：「品牌可以在实时环境中激活，定制广告位以满足活动目标，并根据汇总的参与度洞察持续优化更新广告活动。」

paragraphs.en: To be clear, the EA Advertising push seems focused on the company's sports games for now — though there's nothing to say that similar activity couldn't eventually bleed elsewhere, such as to its hugely-successful The Sims, which recently featured a crossover with Netflix's Bridgerton, or other EA games.
paragraphs.cn: 需要明确的是，EA Advertising目前似乎主要集中在公司的体育游戏上——不过，这并不排除类似做法最终会蔓延到其他领域，比如大获成功的《模拟人生》（该作最近与Netflix的《布里奇顿》进行了联动），或其他EA游戏。

paragraphs.en: Companies already partnered with EA Advertising include Visa, Lowe's, Red Bull, Mountain Dew, Xfinity and Peacock — all of which have previously featured sponsored content within EA Sports games in the past.
paragraphs.cn: 已经与EA Advertising合作的公司包括Visa、Lowe's、红牛、激浪、Xfinity和Peacock——这些公司过去都曾在EA Sports游戏中推出过赞助内容。

paragraphs.en: In-game advertising has become a hot topic of late, as gaming companies look to boost revenues at a time that margins are being squeezed harder than ever. Newly-hired Xbox chief strategy office Matthew Ball recently suggested that advertising could be added to Xbox Game Pass subscriptions, in order to offer them at lower price point.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏内广告近来已成为热门话题，原因是游戏公司希望在利润空间比以往任何时候都更受挤压的情况下提高收入。Xbox新任首席战略官Matthew Ball最近建议，可以在Xbox Game Pass订阅中引入广告，以便提供更低的价格档位。

paragraphs.en: "Ads should be used to offer more affordable alternatives alongside today's ad-free experiences, in the hopes more could play as a result. Similar to how Netflix and Disney+ have ad-tiers with all the same content, but at half the price or so," Ball wrote on social media, while cautioning that this did not mean "in-game ads" as he believed "interrupting the gameplay experience would be bad."
paragraphs.cn: Ball在社交媒体上写道：「广告应该用于在现有无广告体验之外提供更实惠的替代方案，希望因此能让更多人玩到。类似于Netflix和Disney+提供包含相同内容但价格约为一半的广告版。」同时他提醒说，这并不意味着「游戏内广告」，因为他认为「打断游戏体验会很糟糕」。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
